pageSubtitle: Configure everything here: Currency, Fees, White-label Branding, Workflow Engine, and Custom Config JSON — all without code
workflowV1: v1 Legacy — Hardcoded (Safe for current production)
workflowHint: v1 = GARMENT_PROFILES, v2 = workflow_definitions + stages_v2 + snapshots
brandingSubtitle: Guest portal reads from here — hides MJRH branding if enabled
hideMjrh: Hide MJRH branding in guest portal
customConfigSubtitle: Specific project settings (e.g. room_types) — read in work_orders.custom_fields
whyPageTitle: Why was this page empty before?
whyPageBody: Previously settings.tsx was a single file without Outlet. Subpages like /settings/workflow redirected back. Now fixed with Layout/Outlet structure.
